onboarding_desc: Get access to a huge library of movies to suit all tastes. You will surely like it.
explore_genres_desc: Discover movies from every genre, in available qualities. Find something new and exciting to watch every day.
discover_movies_desc: Explore a vast collection of movies in all qualities and genres. Find your next favorite film with ease.
rate_review_desc: Share your thoughts on the movies you've watched. Dive deep into film details and help others discover great movies with your reviews.
watchlist_desc: Save movies to your watchlist to keep track of what you want to watch next. Enjoy films in various qualities and genres.
